Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}I'm thinking of using the cabbage in the fridge to make a cream stew.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I've heard it's healthy from leaf to core, so I'll go ahead and use the entire thing![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}As you can see, I've done my homework. Did you come prepared?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}I'll ask you again once you've eaten it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I'm back on my game after making that perfect chicken sauté.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}This'll be no problem at all![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}That chicken sauté I made was pretty good, wasn't it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Okay, less talking, more cooking![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I'll handle the main dish with the cabbage, so how about you start on the rice and stuff?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I cooked together with Yukari...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The cream stew is mild and delicious...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Whew, I'm stuffed! We made short work of that, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Oh! You said it! You actually said "yum"![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}Finally! I just had to get you to say it today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}C'mon, there's no need to hold back. Either way, I'm satisfied with it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}While we were eating, I could see "yum" written all over your face![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Hey, remember what I said the very first time we cooked together?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}That I'd make it so delicious, you couldn't help saying "yum"? I'm pretty stubborn, you know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 5 13 7 1 2}But I gotta say, it's nice seeing the look on someone's face when they're eating something they really like.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}It's not just about proving myself. It's that I really wanted to see that smile again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}What, did that make me sound selfless? Sorry, but this is still a two-way street![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}Next time it's your turn to do something for me! Let's make some yummy memories together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_012_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}After the successful meal,[n]Yukari is smiling warmly...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Thanks for today. Let's do this again when you have some time.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 159 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}Okay, let's hurry and get this cleaned up.[n]{f 1 1}
